new_jobs.title: Data Entry Assistant (Local Recruitment) (Subject to Donor Approval)
new_jobs.description:
About Action Against Hunger
Action Against Hunger (ACF) is a Non-Governmental Organization (NGO) that was created in France in1979. ACF has been active in Afghanistan in the medical, nutrition, food security, and water and sanitation fields since 1995.ACF improved access to health and nutrition services for the most vulnerable people, who live in remote areas without a localhealth system. In particular, the country team supported pregnant and breastfeeding women and children under five, who are atgreater risk of malnutrition. Nutrition programs rely on an integrated approach, addressing both primary and underlying causes, inorder to have a lasting impact on nutritional status. The country team worked at community level, in villages and at provincial level,strengthening the public health system. It also worked at national level to ensure reliable information about the nutritional situation reached the wider humanitarian community. Covid-19 prevention was integrated into all interventions and additional responseactivities were implemented, such as the disinfection of health facilities and public places, cash assistance, psychosocial support andthe distribution of hygiene kits to affected populations.

Job Description
Objective 1: Ensuring data management through quality-checking, entry, cleaning and first-stage analysis
Enter data in the appropriate templates, and share any challenges with the MEAL officer and MEAL Manager in a timely manner
Clean the entered data (assessment, PDM, etc)
Work closely with the MEAL and the Program team
Evaluate the time required to process data and feedback on progress in processing;
Check data entered;
Detect missing or redundant data and propose possible improvements;
Assist the MEAL manager and MEAL officer with database quality control and inform him/her of any technical problems.
Objective 2: Ensuring filing and archiving of data
Meet security and confidentiality needs for files concerning project activities, at all times
File the questionnaires and computerize the data.
Code the questionnaires according to the database.
Save the data entries regularly as well as the statistical results.
Support the development, maintenance and dissemination of complete information system including collections of good practices
Objective 3: Gather together the elements required for the analysis of data
Sort and cross-check data;
Create tables of statistics;
Draft reports of results based on data entered.
Ensure the analysis of data as needed for preparing report.
Make sure all the programme data is entered in centralized data base in systematic way to use to donor reporting.
Objective 4: Support in translation
Contribute to translation of documents related to program questionnaires (English <-> Pashto/Dari)

Job Requirements
Experience:
At least 2 years of working experience as data entry and MEAL field, in local or international organization
Experience in data entry, data cleaning, data analyzing, data collection, and translation
Required skills:
Proficiency in Microsoft Office.
Strong typing speed and data analysis skills.
Familiar with Nut registers
Good in team working
Able to travel in all Ghor districts
Languages:
Fluent in Dari (written, spoken, read).
Good commands in English (written, spoken, read).
Level of study:
University Degree preferably in Business Administration, Computer science, English literature, Economics or related social science Field.
Advanced computer literacy especially in software base data generating and produce report.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested candidates should submit a cover letter and full CV with three Referees indicating the vacancy announcement to the address: Human Resources Department ACF office or can also be emailed to:
vacancies-dk@af-actionagainsthunger.org indicating the job tile and vacancy number of the position in the email subject line .
Eligible candidates are invited to apply by the earliest possible, until 27 May 2026.
Do not submit academic certificates with the application. These will be requested if the candidate is selected. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for the written test/interview.
Action Against Hunger is an equal opportunity employer. We strongly encourage women and people with disabilities to apply. ACF has zero-tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA)
Employment at Action Against Hunger is free of charge. Action Against Hunger does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruitment process to the candidates. Therefore, please refrain of offering money or any other form of compensation to anyone claiming that they can secure you a job or assist you in the hiring process and this is strictly against our recruitment policy.

Submission Email
vacancies-dk@af-actionagainsthunger.org

new_jobs.title: Software Developer
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The applicant should have proper knowledge of overall software development infrastructure, he/she should have creative mind and should have ability to solve complex problems and scenarios, having the ability to work under tough and short time situations (if needed sometimes), he/she should understand completely the agile software development methodology, familiarity and having experience of using multiple technologies under same platform, ability to sync, read, update, and delete data from single source to many databases and servers, having the idea for management of big data, ability of having complex data analysis and design. he/she should trace issues and development process by Git and provide proper weekly reports to direct managers

Duties and Responsibilities
● An MVC developer that will be able to develop and support existing applications or work with a team to develop new applications.
● The main scope of work will include everything from back-end to client-side code, using optimal and efficient technologies, frameworks, and patterns.
● Your primary responsibilities will be to design and develop these applications.
● It’s essential that you are skilled at problem solving, solution design, and high-quality coding.
● Meet with clients, understand their requirements and develop based on the requirements.
● Customer focused and a good team player
● Provide the necessary documentation to support the software Development Life Cycle.
● Develop prototypes and solutions leveraging a diverse range of technology.
● Apply modern principles, methodologies, tools, and systemic processes to support the launch of new business capabilities.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software, or equivalent formal training, certifications, or work experience in coding are required (Master’s degree proffered).
Experience:
· At least two years of progressively responsible work experience directly related to the duties and responsibilities specified for bachelor’s degree and one year of experience for master degree.
Skills Required:
· Ability of analytical thinking and problem solving
· Willing of researching and self-improvement
· Excellent command of English, Dari/ Pashto, both written and spoken
· Basic knowledge of Java, C#, PHP are fundamental requirement
· Willingness to learn new development methodologies
· Ability to liaison and work with non-programmers
· Good communication skills
· Understanding of object-oriented, procedural and functional programing
· Strong object oriented PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML and CSS knowledge
· Ability to work under pressure and deadline
· MVC Frameworks
· Secure software development would be an advantage
· APIs like Rest and SOAP would be an asset
· Oracle Database would be an asset
· Linux would be an asset
· JavaScript - Ajax knowledge would be an asset
· Translating functional requirements into technical requirements
· Creating timelines and writing technical documentation
· Testing the stability and functionality of the application
· Troubleshooting and fixing bugs
· Maintaining the security and integrity of the application software
· Familiar with Git and resource tracker technologies
· Web services, SQL language and ORM technologies
· Web platform development
· Web application customization

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان میتوانند cv یا خلص صوانح شانرا به ایمیل آدرس های hr@afghantelecom.af با ذکر نمبر بست (Software-001) و عنوان بست درموضوع ایمیل ارسال نمایند. متقاضیانیکه درخواستی خویش را بعد از تاریخ اعلان بست ارسال مینمایند و یا هم شرایط مندرج این بست را تکمیل ننمایند شامل پروسه امتحان تحریری و مصاحبه نمیگردند.

new_jobs.title: کارشناس انتقال تکنالوژی جدید
new_jobs.category: Economy, Information Technology, Software Engineering, Industrial
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
مجهز سازی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی با تکنالوژی های جدید صنعتی برای ایجاد همسویی با معیار های جهانی جهت رسیدن به اهداف شرکت انکشاف ملی.

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف تخصصی
انتقال تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی مطابق نیازمندی شرکت انکشاف ملی از کشور های بیرونی.
پی گیری مشکلات تخنیکی و تکنالوژیکی سیستم های کاری و تولیدی شرکت انکشاف ملی و ارائه راه حل های مناسب برای رفع آنها.
ارزیابی و انتخاب تکنالوژی‌های مناسب برای پروژه‌های ملی با در نظر داشت شرایط محلی.
تحلیل امکان‌سنجی تخنیکی و اقتصادی تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی شامل عواید، مصارف، خطرات و پایداری.
محلی ‌سازی و انطباق تکنالوژی‌وارداتی با شرایط افغانستان.
مدیریت و پیگیری مسائل مربوط به مالکیت فکری ثبت، حفظ و استفاده از حقوق معنوی.
مستندسازی دانش، تجارب و ایجاد بانک معلوماتی تکنالوژی‌ های صنعتی .
نظارت بر رعایت معیارهای جهانی (کیفیت، محیط‌زیست، ایمنی) در استفاده از تکنالوژی‌ صنعتی.
ارائه معلومات و آموزش برای کارکنان فنی شرکت در عرصه استفاده از تکنالوژی جدید صنعتی.
وظایف مدیریتی
تدوین و تطبیق ستراتژی انتقال تکنالوژی صنعتی در سطح شرکت انکشاف ملی.
مدیریت پروژه‌های انتقال تکنالوژی از مرحله طراحی تا تطبیق و ارزیابی.
طراحی برنامه‌های آموزشی و انکشافی برای ارتقای ظرفیت کارمندان.
نظارت و ارزیابی عملکرد پروژه‌ها و سنجش تاثیرات توسعه‌ای.
شناسایی خطرات و ارائه راهکار های مدیریتی برای کاهش آن‌ها.
ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی به رهبری سازمان جهت تصمیم‌گیری بهتر.
وظایف هماهنگی
ایجاد و تقویت روابط با نهادهای جهانی، تمویل‌کنندگان و شرکت‌های تخنیکی.
هماهنگی با بخش‌های داخلی (تخنیکی، مالی، حقوقی و پالیسی) برای پیشبرد پروژه‌ها.
تسهیل انتقال دانش از متخصصین خارجی به کارمندان داخلی.
همکاری با پوهنتون ها، انستیتوت‌ها و مراکز تحقیقاتی برای ارتقای ظرفیت.
تنظیم و پیگیری قرارداد های انتقال تکنالوژی .
حمایت از نوآوری داخلی و ایجاد ارتباط با مخترعین.

Job Requirements
شرایط استخدام
تحصیلات:
حد اقل دارای سند لیسانس در یکی از رشته های اقتصاد صنعتی، انجینری نرم افزار، تکنالوژی معلوماتی و یا سایر رشته ‌های مرتبط؛ به درجات تحصیلی بالاتر ارجحیت داده میشود.
تجربه کاری:
حداقل ۵ سال تجربه کاری در زمینه های مرتبط برای لیسانس و ۳ سال برای ماستر.
مهارت ها:
توانایی کار با سافت ویر های امور تولید و آشنایی کامل در عرصه برنامه کمپیوتری مورد ضرورت در ادارات.

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان می‌توانند درخواست‌های شان‌را از طریق وبسایت Jobs.af بفرستند.
برای ارسال درخواستی روی Apply Now کلیک کنید.
نوت: ضمیمه سی‌وی، اسناد تحصیلی و تذکره تابعیت الزامی می‌باشد.

new_jobs.title: آمر جمع آوری پول Cash Collection Officer
new_jobs.description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
هدف اصلی این بست کاری : آمر جمع آوری پول کسی است که مدیریت حسابات؛ تماس با مشترکین و نهایی کردن پرداخت ها استوار است؛ هدف اصلی آن به حد اقل رساندن مطالبات پولی شرکت و اطمینان از جریان نقدی منظم شرکت است
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
جمع آوری به موقع حق الاشتراک انترنت از مشترکین (حقیقی و حقوقی)؛ کاهش بدهی های پولی؛ ثبت دقیق پرداخت ها و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان در زمینه مالی در مطابقت با پالیسی های شرکت.
بررسی حسابات ؛ نظارت بر سیستم های مالی و حسابداری برای شناسایی مشترکینی که زمان پرداخت پول آن ها فرا رسیده یا گذشته است
تماس با مشترکین؛ تماس تیلفونی؛ ارسال ایمیل؛ پیام یا بازدید حضوری از مشترکین دارای بدهی پولی جهت یادآوری و دریافت پول
مذاکره برای پرداخت؛ گفتگو با مشتریان جهت تعیین تکلیف حساب ها؛ تنظیم اقساط یا نهایی کردن پرداخت های معوق
ثبت و راپوردهی؛ ثبت تمام تعاملات با مشتریان؛ تاریخ تماس ها و تعهدات پرداخت در دیتابیس شرکت
قطع خدمات؛ قطع کردن انترنت مشترکینی که پس از اخطار های مکرر از پرداخت حق الاشتراک خودداری کرده اند
حل منازعات مالی؛ بررسی اختلاف نظر های مالی بین شرکت و مشترک در مورد میزان بدهی و تلاش برای حل آن
جمع آوری نقدی؛ مراجعه حضوری به اماکن مشترکین تجاری/خانگی برای جمع آوری پول نقد یا چک و تحویل آن به خزانه شرکت
ارائه گزارش روزانه؛ هفتوار و ماهوار از وضعیت مجموع پول های جمع آوری شده به مدیر مالی یا مدیر فروشات
گزارش لست بدهکاران و حساب های با ریسک بالا
روابط اساسی کاری
امر جمع آوری پول در ارتباط مستقیم با مدیریت مالی است

Job Requirements
صلاحیت و شرایط
تحصیلات: حد اقل داشتن سند بکلوریا در یکی از رشته های مالی ؛ اقتصاد؛ اداره و تجارت؛ مدیریت مالی و حسابداری ویا معادل به آن ؛ به اسناد لیسانس ترجیح داده میشود
تجربه کاری : از دو الی سه سال مرتبط به بست فوق
مهارت ها
دانش خوب از أصول وقواعد، وسایل و اصطلاحات مالی و حسابداری
دانش خوب از شیوه های ایمنی معیاری مالی؛ حسابداری و کنترول مالیات
توانایی نظارت بر پروسه مالی
ابتکار عمل
قابلیت اطمینان؛ در هر نوع شرایط بر اساس بست فوق

Submission Guideline
ارسال نمایید hr@wsp.af ایمیل آدرس: سی‌وی خود را به آدرس ایمیل
.ضمیمه‌ها: علاقه‌مندان باید سی‌وی ارسال نمایند
اسناد دیگر: سرتیفیکت‌ها و سایر اسناد حمایوی در صورت ضرورت بعداً خواسته خواهد شد
عنوان ایمیل: لطفاً نام بست مورد نظر همراه با وکنسی نمبر و ولایت را به‌ طور واضح در موضوع ایمیل ذکر نمایید

Submission Email
hr@wsp.af

new_jobs.title: System Administrator
new_jobs.description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

Submission Email
vacancies@uatelecom.af

expiring_soon.title: Data Entry Assistant (Local Recruitment) (Subject to Donor Approval)
expiring_soon.description:
About Action Against Hunger
Action Against Hunger (ACF) is a Non-Governmental Organization (NGO) that was created in France in1979. ACF has been active in Afghanistan in the medical, nutrition, food security, and water and sanitation fields since 1995.ACF improved access to health and nutrition services for the most vulnerable people, who live in remote areas without a localhealth system. In particular, the country team supported pregnant and breastfeeding women and children under five, who are atgreater risk of malnutrition. Nutrition programs rely on an integrated approach, addressing both primary and underlying causes, inorder to have a lasting impact on nutritional status. The country team worked at community level, in villages and at provincial level,strengthening the public health system. It also worked at national level to ensure reliable information about the nutritional situation reached the wider humanitarian community. Covid-19 prevention was integrated into all interventions and additional responseactivities were implemented, such as the disinfection of health facilities and public places, cash assistance, psychosocial support andthe distribution of hygiene kits to affected populations.

Job Description
Objective 1: Ensuring data management through quality-checking, entry, cleaning and first-stage analysis
Enter data in the appropriate templates, and share any challenges with the MEAL officer and MEAL Manager in a timely manner
Clean the entered data (assessment, PDM, etc)
Work closely with the MEAL and the Program team
Evaluate the time required to process data and feedback on progress in processing;
Check data entered;
Detect missing or redundant data and propose possible improvements;
Assist the MEAL manager and MEAL officer with database quality control and inform him/her of any technical problems.
Objective 2: Ensuring filing and archiving of data
Meet security and confidentiality needs for files concerning project activities, at all times
File the questionnaires and computerize the data.
Code the questionnaires according to the database.
Save the data entries regularly as well as the statistical results.
Support the development, maintenance and dissemination of complete information system including collections of good practices
Objective 3: Gather together the elements required for the analysis of data
Sort and cross-check data;
Create tables of statistics;
Draft reports of results based on data entered.
Ensure the analysis of data as needed for preparing report.
Make sure all the programme data is entered in centralized data base in systematic way to use to donor reporting.
Objective 4: Support in translation
Contribute to translation of documents related to program questionnaires (English <-> Pashto/Dari)

Job Requirements
Experience:
At least 2 years of working experience as data entry and MEAL field, in local or international organization
Experience in data entry, data cleaning, data analyzing, data collection, and translation
Required skills:
Proficiency in Microsoft Office.
Strong typing speed and data analysis skills.
Familiar with Nut registers
Good in team working
Able to travel in all Ghor districts
Languages:
Fluent in Dari (written, spoken, read).
Good commands in English (written, spoken, read).
Level of study:
University Degree preferably in Business Administration, Computer science, English literature, Economics or related social science Field.
Advanced computer literacy especially in software base data generating and produce report.

Submission Guideline
Qualified and interested candidates should submit a cover letter and full CV with three Referees indicating the vacancy announcement to the address: Human Resources Department ACF office or can also be emailed to:
vacancies-dk@af-actionagainsthunger.org indicating the job tile and vacancy number of the position in the email subject line .
Eligible candidates are invited to apply by the earliest possible, until 27 May 2026.
Do not submit academic certificates with the application. These will be requested if the candidate is selected. Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for the written test/interview.
Action Against Hunger is an equal opportunity employer. We strongly encourage women and people with disabilities to apply. ACF has zero-tolerance policy on sexual exploitation, sexual harassment, and abuse (SEA)
Employment at Action Against Hunger is free of charge. Action Against Hunger does not charge any fee at any stage of the recruitment process to the candidates. Therefore, please refrain of offering money or any other form of compensation to anyone claiming that they can secure you a job or assist you in the hiring process and this is strictly against our recruitment policy.

Submission Email
vacancies-dk@af-actionagainsthunger.org

tech_banking_jobs.title: Sharia Audit Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
